spec.description: Identifier of the semantic specification this model conforms to.

specVersion.description: Version of the semantic specification the model conforms to.

modelUri.description: Reference to the source semantic model document. Full-fidelity definitions (including multi-dialect expressions) live here; the inline fields below are lightweight hints for consumers that do not resolve the model.

entity.description: Name of the logical entity/dataset in the semantic model that this physical dataset backs.

metrics.description: Metrics defined on this entity. A lightweight projection of the semantic model for inline display; see modelUri for authoritative, dialect-aware definitions.

expression.description: Display-only expression. Not dialect-qualified; resolve modelUri for the full expression set.

dimensions.description: Dimensions defined on this entity. A lightweight projection of the semantic model for inline display; see modelUri for authoritative, dialect-aware definitions.

isTime.description: Whether this dimension is a time dimension.

expression.description: Display-only expression. Not dialect-qualified; resolve modelUri for the full expression set.
